publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-03-17 23:21:38 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, subject files, and personal and professional papers.
did.abstract: Correspondence, reports, subject files, and personal and professional papers; includes an article: "Economic Transition of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam." Also, "Vietnam Files" and computer printouts; and records of the regional plan and development of the Arusha Region of Tanzania.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University graduate, planning and management consultant, professor.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, reports, subject files, and personal and professional papers; includes an article: "Economic Transition of the Socialist Republic of Vietnam." Also, "Vietnam Files" and computer printouts; and records of the regional plan and development of the Arusha Region of Tanzania.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Charles F. Sweet papers, #4827. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

did.unittitle: Economic Transition in the Socialist Republic of Vietnam by Charles F. Sweet and Ruy Y. Moreno,
National Student Association (NSA) Visit to Viet-Nam
[H.R. 15750 - an Act to amend further the Foreign Assistance Act of 1961, ...]
Southeast Asia Development Advisory Group [SEADAG] Transferability Conference - I
Lessons from China and a Strategy for Counter-Subversion
Untitled [Miscellany, including family letters from Sweet, reports, IVS newsletters, 1964-1966 ]
Lansdale on Tet/Lansdale on Cao Dai
Lansdale on leaked report re: elections
Order of Battle (Nixon Policy Paper III)
Carver - Real Revolution in South Viet-Nam
"Arusha Region: Health Sector Assessment by P. Stanley Yoder for Development Alternatives, Inc." (DAI)
Mbulu District; Massai reports by Henry Fosbrooke for DAI
Cornell University, Report on Evaluation Visit to the APVDP Graduate Training Programme in Regional Planning at
Development Project, Arusha Planning and Village,
Issue Abstracts in English and Swahili,
"Sector Assistant of Tourism in the Arusha Region of Tanzania" by Victoria A. Morse
Guideline for the Preparation of the Regional Estimates for the 1981-82 Financial Year
Sudan Rural Development Planning Project Trip Report, by Mike Sarco
Women and Development: A Case Study of Ten Tanzanian Villages, by Liz Wily
Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - Fourth Annual Plan - 1982-1983 , Mar. 1, 1982
Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - Eighth Quarter Progress Report,
Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - Ninth Quarter Progress Report,
Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - Tenth Quarter Progress,
Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - A Discussion Paper Written by Donald S. Humpal, DAI Staff Agriculturist for AP/VDP & RIDEP - Arusha,
Center and Periphery in Arusha Region: Institutional Capacities and Development Initiatives in the Context of Existing Governmental Structures and Village Organization, by Garry L. Thomas, DAI,
Proposed Dongobesh Gravity Rural Water Supply Scheme, prepared by Arusha Regional Water Department and Arusha Planning and Village Development Project for Regional Development Directorate, Arusha
Encouraging Village Self-Reliance in Arumeru District, Tanzania, by Joyce Stanley
Hainu River Study Pre-Feasibility Report, TANESCO, APVDP,
The Livestock Sector in Arusha, by I.C. Walton,
Livestock, Wildlife and Land Use Survey, Arusha Region, Tanzania, Final Report, Volume 2: Figures and Tables
Prime Minister's Office - Arusha Planning and Village Development Project - 2nd Annual Work Plan,
Prime Minister's Office - Road Priority Determination Arusha Region, Report prepared by Dr. Benno J. Ndulu,
The Status and Utilization of Wildlife in Arusha Region, Tanzania

The Village Profile Exercise - Background Information, Impressions and Perceptions for Arusha Planning and Village Development Project and the Regional Development Directorate, Arusha, by D.D. Peterson and T.T. Peterson,
An Assessment of the Revenue Generation Capabilities of Villages, Districts and Arusha Region: Some Policy Options, July 1981 , with Executive Summary
Volume Two - Development Strategies and Priorities for the Next 20 Years
Volume Four - Major Areas for Long-Term Investments
Volume Five - Information Strategy and Documentation
The Financial Infrastructure in Tanzania: Perspectives, Problems and Policy Strategies with Policy and Program Implications for Arusha Region,
